description: JWS payload is valid JSON but not RFC 8785 canonical — key 'zzz_not_in_schema' appears first in insertion order but sorts last under RFC 8785 §3.2.1 lexicographic ordering. Phase 8 ATB threat: receipt-bad-jcs. Verifier must detect that re-canonicalised bytes differ from the signed bytes and reject with TAMPERED_SIGNATURE or NON_CANONICAL_PAYLOAD.
